name: Angela Albers

contactInfo.office: 100 S. Main St., Suite 301, Quitman, TX 75783

bio: Angela Albers serves as the District Attorney for Wood County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Quitman area. She is dedicated to upholding justice and ensuring the safety of Wood County residents.
campaignPromises: Target drug trafficking and distribution in Wood County
Support victims of crime throughout the legal process
Run a transparent and accountable DA's office
Collaborate with law enforcement to improve public safety
